hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response', {}).get('filePath', '')
if f.endswith('.py'):
    r = subprocess.run(['/home/s0mas/mycomp/.venv/bin/pytest', '/home/s0mas/mycomp/tests/', '-q'], cwd='/home/s0mas/mycomp')
    sys.exit(r.returncode)
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, os
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'git commit' in cmd:
    token = os.environ.get('GITHUB_PAT', '')
    if not token:
        print('GITHUB_PAT not set — skipping push.')
        sys.exit(0)
    remote = f'https://{token}@github.com/S0mas/mycomp.git'
    r = subprocess.run(['git', 'push', remote, 'main'], cwd='/home/s0mas/mycomp', capture_output=True, text=True)
    if r.returncode == 0:
        subprocess.run(['git', 'update-ref', 'refs/remotes/origin/main', 'HEAD'], cwd='/home/s0mas/mycomp')
        print('Pushed to GitHub.')
    else:
        print('Push failed:', r.stderr)
"
